creator: danton@freebsdbrasil.com.br
text:
Hello, I did a new port SnortSam to the Ports Tree and if possible you could to include a patch to Snort Master Port, and this feature disabling it by default. Facilitating the integration between the port that I'm sending and the current port, I suggest this plugin. Thus we don't need to the create a new port to include this plugin only
You can get this patch file in http://www.freebsdbrasil.com.br/~urisso/files/Makefile-snort.diff
